query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS network_referrals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  referringContractorId INT NOT NULL,
  receivingContractorId INT,
  clientName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  clientEmail VARCHAR(255),
  clientCompany VARCHAR(255),
  projectDescription TEXT,
  projectValue DECIMAL(12,2),
  referralFeeAmount DECIMAL(10,2),
  referralFeePercentage DECIMAL(5,2),
  status ENUM('pending', 'accepted', 'completed', 'paid', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  referredAt DATETIME NOT NULL,
  acceptedAt DATETIME,
  completedAt DATETIME,
  paidAt DATETIME,
  paymentReference VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  referringContractorId INT NOT NULL,
  receivingContractorId INT,
  clientName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,

  referredAt DATETIME NOT NULL,
  acceptedAt DATETIME,
  completedAt DATETIME,
  paidAt DATETIME,
  paymentReference VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
